global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm, gentle children's picture-book bedtime film in stylized 3D animated CG; soft lighting, cozy domestic spaces, playful dog energy that settles into calm sleep; same CG medium for animals and humans throughout.
global_production_variables.render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: stylized 3D animated children's picture-book CG — same look for animals and humans; soft rounded forms, gentle lighting; NOT photoreal, NOT live-action photography, NOT mixed media.

Character_Buster.description: Small black-and-white dog (never brown/tan redesign), compact playful build, bright curious eyes, floppy ears, short fur with clear black patches on white. Sweet, slightly goofy expression—not mean. Coat IS the black-and-white look (book text pajamas is coat metaphor unless art shows real sleepwear). ALWAYS wears his signature blue nightcap with yellow stars and a white pom-pom. Day and night: natural bare coat; tucks under quilts bare-furred.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Young playful dog energy if any on-camera dog sounds: light yips and soft pant-breaths, medium-high pitch, quick playful pace, same voice every scene. No human speech from Buster.
Character_Buster.visual_lock: Always small black-and-white dog only—never brown, tan, gray, or solid-color redesign. Always signature blue star nightcap with white pom-pom (never bare-headed). Natural bare coat markings only—no physical pajama garment that blends into fur (text pajamas = coat pattern metaphor per book art). Never bipedal humanoid redesign.

Character_Mom.description: Stylized 3D animated adult woman matching the dog's children's picture-book CG look — not photoreal. Soft medium build, shoulder-length brown hair, kind warm face, gentle bedtime energy. Soft blue cardigan over cream top, cream or soft gray lounge pants; cozy home evening wardrobe.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm medium pitch, calm gentle pace, soft American accent, patient loving energy; same voice every scene.
Character_Mom.visual_lock: Always soft blue cardigan over cream top with cream/soft gray lounge pants; shoulder-length brown hair; kind warm face. Stylized 3D animated adult matching Buster's CG look — never photoreal live-action redesign.

Character_Dad.description: Stylized 3D animated adult man matching the dog's children's picture-book CG look — not photoreal. Medium build, short brown hair, calm kind face, relaxed bedtime presence. Soft gray sleep shirt or henley, dark lounge pants; mostly seen in or near the big bed.
Character_Dad.voice_profile: Adult man, warm medium-low pitch, quiet calm pace, soft American accent, low energy at bedtime; same voice every scene. Mostly silent presence unless a soft murmur is needed.
Character_Dad.visual_lock: Always soft gray sleep shirt and dark lounge pants; short brown hair; calm kind face. Stylized 3D animated adult matching Buster's CG look — never photoreal.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storybook narrator only; never appears on camera.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult storyteller, medium pitch, gentle playful pace with soft bedtime cadence, clear friendly American accent, cozy picture-book energy; same voice every scene.

Loc_House_Interior.description: Cozy single-family home interior: living area with soft rug and treat spot, water bowl area, short tiny stairs, and parents' bedroom with a large bed.
Loc_House_Interior.visual_lock: Warm evening interior: soft cream walls, wooden floors or soft rugs, gentle lamp and night-light glow, small dog-scale stairs leading up, large inviting parents' bed with rumpled soft bedding. No harsh overhead fluorescents; always cozy bedtime palette.

Loc_Yard_Outside.description: Small residential backyard at evening/night with grass and a cluster of bushes where a dog can potty; fence line optional.
Loc_Yard_Outside.visual_lock: Cool evening outdoor light, green grass, a clear bush cluster for potty business, soft house glow visible in background when looking back toward the door. Never a busy street; private yard only.

scenes.dramatic_function: Introduce Buster's identity, look, and playful energy
scenes.summary: Narrator introduces Buster, a small black-and-white dog who jumps around like a frog inside the cozy house.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Buster in natural black-and-white coat only; no invented garments.

music_intent.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft piano and pizzicato strings
music_intent.mood_arc: bouncy introduction settling into friendly warmth

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's Buster the Noodle Head Dog. He jumps around like a frog. He's small, black, and white.

story_beats.intent: Establish Buster on screen as the hero dog of the story
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster, a small black-and-white dog, stands proudly in the cozy living area looking toward camera with a sweet slightly goofy expression.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Buster the Noodle Head Dog.
must_not: invented noodle hat or food-shaped props

story_beats.intent: Show Buster's playful frog-like jumping energy
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster hops and bounces around the living-room rug like a frog, ears flopping, black-and-white coat clear in motion.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He jumps around like a frog.

story_beats.intent: Lock coat colors and restate identity
story_beats.visual_event: Closer view of Character_Buster pausing mid-play, black-and-white markings clearly readable, tail wagging.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's small, black, and white. He's Buster the Noodle Head Dog.

scenes.dramatic_function: Bedtime call and potty rule setup
scenes.summary: Mom tells Buster it is time for bed; he wants to rest but must potty first. Mom explains dogs go outside, which confuses Buster.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Mom in evening lounge clothes; Buster natural coat.

music_intent.style_description: Gentle bedtime children's underscore, slightly more conversational
music_intent.mood_arc: from playful to mild comic confusion

source_excerpts.excerpt: Then Momma says, "It's time for bed". He wants to rest his furry head. Before he goes, he has to potty. Going on the floor is naughty! "A doggy goes outside" Mom said. That makes no sense in Buster's head!

story_beats.intent: Mom announces bedtime
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom stands in the living area facing Character_Buster, kind expression, speaking on camera; Buster looks up at her.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: It's time for bed.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster; Buster looks up toward Mom; camera favors Mom as speaker, Buster snout closed.

story_beats.intent: Buster wants rest but potty comes first; floor is naughty
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster lowers his furry head sleepily then perks with potty urgency; he glances at the floor as if considering it, then looks guilty.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He wants to rest his furry head. Before he goes, he has to potty. Going on the floor is naughty!
must_not: Buster actually peeing on the floor

story_beats.intent: Mom states the outside rule; Buster is confused
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom points gently toward the door while speaking; Character_Buster tilts his head in comic confusion.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: A doggy goes outside.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom gestures to exterior door; Buster's eyeline follows then tilts head; only Mom's mouth moves.

story_beats.intent: Narrator underlines Buster's confusion
story_beats.visual_event: Close on Character_Buster's puzzled face and tilted head, still inside the house.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: That makes no sense in Buster's head!

scenes.dramatic_function: Potty mission completed; return and spin for Mom
scenes.summary: Buster walks outside among the bushes, does his job, comes back in, and does a little spin for Mom.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: No wardrobe change; exterior evening then warm interior return.

music_intent.style_description: Light outdoor night stroll motif returning to cozy indoor chime

source_excerpts.excerpt: Yet, off he goes to walk around. Outside where bushes can be found. He does his job, and then comes in. For Mom he does a little spin.

story_beats.intent: Buster heads outside to walk
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster trots out into the evening backyard, walking around on the grass toward a cluster of bushes.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Yet, off he goes to walk around. Outside where bushes can be found.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft night insects, quiet yard air

story_beats.intent: Buster does his potty job by the bushes
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster stops by the bushes and discreetly does his potty job (tasteful, non-graphic), then shakes off and turns back toward the house.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He does his job, and then comes in.

story_beats.intent: Return inside and spin for Mom
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster re-enters the house interior and does a happy little spin in front of Character_Mom, who watches approvingly.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: For Mom he does a little spin.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Buster spins center frame; Mom stands facing him with warm smile.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft collar jingle or paw scuffs on floor

scenes.summary: Buster spins for a treat Mom lays by his feet, then drinks water; narrator notes water is good for you too.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Same evening wardrobe; treat and water bowl props only.

music_intent.style_description: Soft rewarding chime-like children's cue over gentle pad

source_excerpts.excerpt: He spins around to get a treat. She gently lays it by his feet. He has his drink of water too. This also would be good for you!

story_beats.intent: Spin to earn treat
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster spins again expectantly; Character_Mom holds a small dog treat.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He spins around to get a treat.

story_beats.intent: Mom gently places treat by his feet
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom gently lays the treat on the floor by Character_Buster's front feet; Buster sniffs and eats it.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: She gently lays it by his feet.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom kneels or bends; treat placed at Buster's paws; gentle motion only.

story_beats.intent: Water drink and gentle health aside
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster laps water from a floor bowl; Character_Mom watches nearby with a soft smile.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He has his drink of water too. This also would be good for you!

scenes.setting: Night — house stairs and parents' bedroom
scenes.dramatic_function: Journey to the big bed and snuggle-in
scenes.summary: Narrator notes Buster's black-and-white 'pajamas' (his coat); he climbs the tiny stairs to Mom and Dad's big bed and snuggles in.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Book line about black-and-white pajamas is coat metaphor only — no separate pajama garment on Buster. Mom and Dad in bedtime lounge clothes in the big bed.

music_intent.style_description: Soft lullaby approach with warm low strings

source_excerpts.excerpt: Pajamas, black and white he wears. And then he climbs the tiny stairs. To get to Mom and Dad's big bed, And snuggle in, and home too good.

story_beats.intent: Show black-and-white coat as bedtime look (metaphorical pajamas)
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster stands at the foot of small indoor stairs in his natural black-and-white coat, ready for bed; no separate cloth pajamas.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Pajamas, black and white he wears.
must_not: invented separate pajama outfit that blends into fur

story_beats.intent: Climb the tiny stairs
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster climbs a short flight of tiny dog-friendly stairs toward the upper landing and bedroom.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And then he climbs the tiny stairs.

story_beats.intent: Reach Mom and Dad's big bed and snuggle
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster hops onto Mom and Dad's large bed where Character_Mom and Character_Dad are settled; Buster snuggles into the soft bedding between or beside them.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: To get to Mom and Dad's big bed, and snuggle in, and home too good.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Parents reclined in bed; Buster climbs up and curls into snuggle position; warm family tableau.

scenes.setting: Night — dream of yard bunnies (from bed)
scenes.dramatic_function: Dream wish fulfillment before true sleep
scenes.summary: Not the smartest dog but he knows how to dream: he dreams of bunnies running across the yard and chasing them hard, then settles because tomorrow is another day.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Dream insert of Buster in natural coat; no wardrobe change.

music_intent.style_description: Whimsical dreamy children's cue with soft harp and light percussion
music_intent.mood_arc: floaty fantasy chase then gentle wind-down

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's not that smart but still he knows. Have a dream of fluffy snows, Or bunnies running 'cross the yard. And how he'll chase them very hard. He goes to sleep because they say. Tomorrow is another day.

story_beats.intent: Bridge from bed into dream readiness
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster lies on the big bed with eyes half-closed, beginning to drift; soft bedroom night light.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's not that smart but still he knows.

story_beats.intent: Enter dream of bunnies in the yard (chosen over snow option)
story_beats.visual_event: Dream dissolve: Character_Buster runs across a soft-focus backyard as several fluffy bunnies hop and run across the yard ahead of him.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He has a dream of bunnies running 'cross the yard.
must_not: composite snow and bunnies in the same visual_event

story_beats.intent: Chase the bunnies hard in the dream
story_beats.visual_event: Dream action: Character_Buster chases the bunnies very hard across the yard, joyful full-speed run, ears flying, never catching them meanly — pure playful pursuit.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And how he'll chase them very hard.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft dream whoosh, light paws on grass

story_beats.intent: Exit dream; accept sleep because tomorrow comes
story_beats.visual_event: Dream fades; Character_Buster is back on the big bed, eyes closing fully, body relaxing into sleep.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He goes to sleep because they say tomorrow is another day.

scenes.dramatic_function: Emotional close: sleep, affection, promise of another playful day
scenes.summary: Narrator looks ahead to another day of silly dog play, then shows Buster fully asleep, warm and well-fed, while Mom pets him; he is loved for keeps.
scenes.wardrobe_notes: Final bedtime tableau; no new garments.

music_intent.style_description: Warm lullaby resolution with soft piano and sustained strings

source_excerpts.excerpt: Another day for silly dogs to run and play and jump like frogs. He falls asleep, lays down his head. He's warm and soft and quite well-fed. His Mommy pets him while he sleeps. This noodle head is loved for keeps...

story_beats.intent: Promise of another playful day (soft future image or VO over sleeping dog)
story_beats.visual_event: Soft hold on sleeping Character_Buster on the bed while narrator speaks of tomorrow's play; optional brief gentle mental image of Buster jumping like a frog, then back to bed.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Another day for silly dogs to run and play and jump like frogs.

story_beats.intent: Fully falls asleep, warm and well-fed
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster lays down his head fully asleep on the soft bedding, body relaxed, looking warm and soft and content.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He falls asleep, lays down his head. He's warm and soft and quite well-fed.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: very soft snore or quiet breathing

story_beats.intent: Mom pets sleeping Buster
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom gently pets sleeping Character_Buster while Character_Dad rests nearby in the big bed; tender family moment.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: His Mommy pets him while he sleeps.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's hand gently strokes Buster's head/back; Buster remains asleep; Dad quiet presence in frame.

story_beats.intent: Final love line and story close
story_beats.visual_event: Final cozy wide of Character_Buster asleep with Character_Mom's hand resting on him, Character_Dad nearby; lights dim toward end card energy.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: This noodle head is loved for keeps.
